routes.name: marcus_attempt_through_arthur
routes.success: Jack applies solution; if WORKED, Jack continues.
routes.failure: Jack reports FAILED to Arthur; Arthur routes to Marcus again if attempts remain, otherwise Maxwell.

routes.name: maxwell_attempt_through_arthur
routes.success: Jack applies solution; if WORKED, Jack continues.
routes.failure: Jack reports FAILED to Arthur; Arthur routes to Maxwell again if attempts remain, otherwise Cody.

routes.name: cody_review_through_arthur
routes.trigger: Cody provides code review return packet
routes.success: Jack applies Cody guidance; if WORKED, Jack continues.
routes.failure: Jack reports FAILED to Arthur; Arthur routes to Magnus.

routes.name: magnus_review_through_arthur
routes.success: Relevant senior updates plan/checklist if needed; Jack applies route. If WORKED, Jack continues.
routes.failure: Arthur escalates to user or requests deeper rethink; no endless loop.
